name: Shrimp with Fettucine
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Tomatoes, peeled and seeded, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipe for Creole Seafood Seasoning.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the butter, shrimp, garlic, parsley, onions, mushrooms, tomatoes, scallions, and seafood seasoning. Stir gently for 30 seconds.
3. Add the shrimp stock and cook until the onions are transparent.
4. Add the cooked fettuccine and white wine. Simmer until the sauce is almost absorbed and the shrimp are pink.
5. Remove the pan from the heat and add the butter. Stir gently until the butter is melted and creamy.
6. Serve immediately.
